---
title: "How to use FlowJo v11"
format: html
---

# Installation

![](/images/Install/00_Download.png)

![](/images/Install/01_InstallerSave.png)

![](/images/Install/02_ApplicationsToSetup.png)

![](/images/Install/03_Location.png)

![](/images/Install/04_Location2.png)

![](/images/Install/05_Install.png)

![](/images/Install/06_Waiting.png)

![](/images/Install/07_Complete.png)

# Getting Started

![](/images/Intro/00_BDAccess.png)

![](/images/Intro/00_BDAccessLoggedIn.png)

![](/images/Intro/00_Landing.png)

![](/images/Intro/00_Starting.png)

![](/images/Intro/01_NewWorkbench.png)

![](/images/Intro/02_WorkBenchLanding.png)

![](/images/Intro/03_AddSamples.png)

![](/images/Intro/04_AddingSamples.png)

![](/images/Intro/05_CheckingLoadedSpecimens.png)

![](/images/Intro/06_SwitchingBetween.png)

![](/images/Intro/07_Polygon.png)

![](/images/Intro/08_Scatter.png)

![](/images/Intro/09_DoubleClicking.png)

![](/images/Intro/10_ChangeAxis.png)

![](/images/Intro/11_NavigatingHierarchy.png)

![](/images/Intro/12_AlternateSelectionMethods.png)

![](/images/Intro/13_AllGates.png)

![](/images/Intro/00_BDAccess.png)

![](/images/Intro/15_SaveLocation.png)
